items.title: Production Department
items.summary:
Aja Alloys Pvt. Ltd. invites applications for the following Production Department positions:

1. Shift In charge, 9 slots
2. CRO (Control Room Operator), 4 slots
3. Stroking Car Operator, 4 slots
4. Senior Tapper, 1 slot
5. Tapper, 6 slots
6. Tapper Helper, 16 slots
7. Crane Operator, 4 slots
8. RMHS Supervisor, 1 slot
9. Packing Supervisor, 1 slot

Total slots: 46.

Interested candidates may submit their application by email to info@aja.bt.
